params.name: Ride of the Valkyries
params.description:
On Jun 13, 1870 AD, the Ride of the Valkyries premiered at the Munich Opera House.
The Ride of the Valkyries is part of the opera Die Walküre, which connects with Das Rheingold. Wotan wishes to obtain the ring and hopes to create a warrior on Earth to break Alberich's curse. He comes to earth and gives birth to the twin siblings Siegmund and Sieglinde, but they later become separated. Years later, Sieglinde marries the warrior Hunding, and Siegmund fights him. Wotan helps Hunding kill Siegmun …
